name: Refuted Wind
short_description: Mysterious murders are happening in the area where Dave lives. In an attempt to draw attention to these horrific events, he decides to make a short film. As his project becomes known, frightening events begin to happen around him.
detailed_description:
Refuted Wind

This is an atmospheric adventure that will immerse you in a mysterious story. During the game, you will visit many unique places, each of which evokes a feeling of fear and anxiety. Mysterious murders occur in the area where Dave lives. The police cannot find the criminal. Trying to draw attention to these horrific events, he decides to make a short film. When his idea is mentioned in the local newspaper, strange things begin to happen...

Gameplay

As you progress through the game, you will encounter events that will create tension.

Key Features

  • Atmospheric environment

  • Many interesting locations

  • VHS aesthetics
